name: 000 Game State Tester - Full Flow Harness
goalText: Graybox the opening flow: Mars Telum cold open, Earth hospital, garage escape, Gabe meeting, mount-up story map, and practice sparring.

maps.name: 008 Mars Cold Open - Aether Core Leak
maps.objectiveSummary: Silence the alarm and fire through the core leak

maps.name: 010 Underground Parking Garage Escape
maps.objectiveSummary: Keep Skye alive; reach Eve’s car

maps.name: 012 Gabrielle Mech Bay - Mount Up
maps.objectiveSummary: Mount up and walk to the training bay

briefing.title: Game State Tester
briefing.text: Internal tester mission for campaign/system passes. This is the stable harness used to prove the current runtime foundation before broader campaign progression is layered on top.
objectives: Confirm dialogue, objectives, triggers, protect-unit, and enter-mech behavior.

objectives.label: Silence the alarm and fire through the core leak
objectives.briefingText: Hit the hostile Telum before Skye’s Aether Core fails.

lines.name: System
lines.text: Linked cold-opening flow loaded.

lines.name: TELUM WARNING
lines.text: AETHER CORE LEAK DETECTED. COCKPIT EXPOSURE RISING.

lines.name: Skye
lines.text: Yeah. I heard you the first six times. Silence alarm.

lines.name: TELUM WARNING
lines.text: Manual alarm suppression accepted. Reactor containment unstable.

lines.name: Skye
lines.text: We are not done with this dance until I say we are.

lines.name: Nurse
lines.text: Easy. Do not try to sit up.

lines.name: Skye
lines.text: How long?

lines.name: Nurse
lines.text: Two weeks. Aether exposure, neural shock, fractured ribs, and more paperwork than blood.

lines.name: Skye
lines.text: No. How much?

lines.name: Doctor
lines.text: Your account has been settled. The payer is not listed in the patient-facing record.

lines.name: Skye
lines.text: Kholer did not pay this. They do not put cash into broken parts.

lines.name: Eve
lines.text: Skye! There she is. Tragic, but alive. Gabe sends his regards.

lines.name: Skye
lines.text: ...Fine. I know Gabe. I play along.

lines.name: Eve
lines.text: Good. Elevator. Try not to bleed on anything expensive. Again.

lines.name: Skye
lines.text: If I die in this tracksuit, I am haunting you.

lines.name: Eve
lines.text: You already bled all over it. Keep moving. Car is across the garage.

lines.name: Recovery Team
lines.text: Patient transfer hold. Stop where you are.

lines.name: Eve
lines.text: See? They are using their serious voices. Adorable.

lines.name: Skye
lines.text: Gabe. I will pay you back for the hospital. Somehow.

lines.name: Gabe
lines.text: No, you will not. I did not pay your hospital bill.

lines.name: Skye
lines.text: Then who did?

lines.name: Gabe
lines.text: That is the part that should worry you. I only got you out.

lines.name: Skye
lines.text: Out of kindness? Nostalgia?

lines.name: Gabe
lines.text: Business. I need a pilot with Kholer knowledge. You are not free, Skye. Just under a different boot.

lines.name: Eve
lines.text: He says the romantic stuff first. Wait until he gets to scheduling.

lines.name: Gabe
lines.text: In the morning, we get you suited up and back into a Telum. You think you can heal fast enough?

lines.name: Skye
lines.text: Can I burn the tracksuit?

lines.name: Eve
lines.text: Might as well. You bled all over it.

lines.name: Gabe
lines.text: Your frame is the grey-and-black unit. Eve gets the white-and-gold one because subtlety died before breakfast.

lines.name: Eve
lines.text: Subtlety was boring and owed me money.

lines.name: Gabe
lines.text: Walk to the rear hatch and mount up. Then move the frame to the training bay marker.

lines.name: Skye
lines.text: Back in a box with guns. Almost missed it.

lines.name: Eve
lines.text: You look better when the machine is doing the standing.

lines.name: Gabe
lines.text: Move it forward. I need to know the ribs are not making you useless.

lines.name: Gabe
lines.text: Practice frames are live. Low charge, real targeting, no heroics.

lines.name: Skye
lines.text: You put me in a Telum with busted ribs and asked for no heroics?

lines.name: Eve
lines.text: I heard “show off responsibly.”

lines.name: Gabe
lines.text: Defeat the practice mechs. Then we talk about the job.

lines.name: Gabe
lines.text: Good. The flow works. You can still pilot. That makes tomorrow possible.

lines.name: Skye
lines.text: Tomorrow sounds expensive.

lines.name: System
lines.text: Cold-opening flow failed. Retry the graybox mission.

victory.title: Cold Opening Flow Complete
victory.text: Mars combat, hospital story mode, garage escape, Gabe meeting, mount-up, and sparring combat all resolved through linked mission maps.

defeat.title: Cold Opening Flow Failed
defeat.text: Skye was disabled during the graybox flow.

summary: Internal game-state tester mission. Exercises combat, story mode, phase briefings, dialogue, objectives, triggers, logic, protect-unit, CPU ally, enter/exit mech, and map-phase handoff.
